## Testing
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest`
- [ ] `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`
- [ ] `npm --prefix functions run build` (when backend changed)
- [ ] Tested on a physical device/emulator

## Screenshots / recording

## Checklist
- [ ] Change is focused and follows module dependency rules
- [ ] No secrets, service files, personal data, or signing material are committed
- [ ] Accessibility and light/dark themes were considered
- [ ] Room migration/rules tests were added when applicable
- [ ] Documentation and CHANGELOG were updated when applicable
